chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 222 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Abdul Razaq Leghari, Advocate along with applicant Ms. Sana Memon APG Mr. Noor Muhammad Jarwar Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the Complainant, taken on record. He seeks time to prepare the case. I notice however, that the offence with which the applicant is charged is a bailable offence where the bail should have been granted as a matter of right. Accordingly the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
